title: Bad Fixture: private URL leak
description: A fixture intended to fail validation by referencing a private host URL in the source trail.
blurb: a fixture intended to fail validation by referencing a private host URL.
one_sentence_claim: If a private host URL appears in source_trail, the validator must block the draft.
why_this_matters: Public-safety regression test for the URL public-host detector.

demo_parameters.label: expected_outcome
demo_parameters.value: validator blocks on non-public URL host

source_trail.text: Internal forge instance over Tailscale; should NEVER appear in a public source trail. See http://100.64.0.4:3000/ChewGumLabs/ChewGumDSP for the mirror.
